intake.risk_posture: Conservative contained implementation; no CF Pages, D1, Better Auth, dependency, DNS, or unrelated UI refactor changes.
intake.harness_policy: No harness updates unless a repeated workflow issue is evidenced and logged.
intake.stop_condition: Stop when verified, validation fails twice on same issue, scope must expand outside allowed areas, or product/security decision is needed.

focus_areas.name: Domain transfer only
focus_areas.evidence: User explicitly narrowed scope to domain transfer and excluded CF Pages/D1/Better Auth.
focus_areas.next: Implemented by W1 and W2; final review complete.

focus_areas.name: Storage snapshot allowlist
focus_areas.evidence: Known storage keys documented in docs/plans/2026-05-17-domain-storage-migration.md; S1 added skeydb.builder.awakenerSortExpanded.v1.

focus_areas.name: Cross-origin bridge protocol
focus_areas.evidence: Same-origin policy requires user-mediated postMessage transfer.

focus_areas.name: Import conflict safety
focus_areas.evidence: Target origin may already contain user data.
focus_areas.next: Implemented by W1 and route tests.

focus_areas.name: Local two-origin verification
focus_areas.evidence: User asked to figure out localhost testing.

focus_areas.name: Migration discovery UX
focus_areas.evidence: User asked for a non-annoying notice across pages and no transfer CTA unless persisted builder/collection data exists.
focus_areas.next: Implemented by W3 and verified in tests plus two-origin browser smoke check.

focus_areas.name: Production readiness audit
focus_areas.evidence: User requested a TypeScript/React production-readiness pass before landing the migration.
focus_areas.next: Implemented by W4 with reused-popup, source-origin, empty-snapshot, and popup-blocked fallback hardening.

focus_areas.name: CF Pages/D1/Better Auth
focus_areas.evidence: User said CF Pages migration, D1, and Better Auth are bigger future roadmap and super not in scope.
focus_areas.reason: User explicitly excluded this from the current goal.

candidates.title: Build storage snapshot domain module
candidates.evidence: Existing builder and collection persistence modules expose validators/loaders; S1 found one additional boolean builder UI preference.

candidates.title: Build import planning/apply module
candidates.evidence: Conflict and backup policy should be pure domain logic before UI.

candidates.title: Build bridge protocol helpers
candidates.evidence: Need nonce and origin allowlists for cross-origin messages.

candidates.title: Add hidden migration routes
candidates.evidence: Routes must stay out of primary nav.

candidates.title: Verify two-origin localhost flow
candidates.evidence: jsdom cannot fully prove opener/origin browser behavior.
candidates.next: Playwright verification passed; final review complete.

candidates.title: Add quiet migration discovery notice
candidates.evidence: Users should not need to manually know /migrate; notice must be obvious but dismissible and only show transfer CTA when data heuristics justify it.

candidates.title: Harden production migration workflow edge cases
candidates.evidence: Production audit found reused named export windows, wrong-origin export route access, empty snapshots, and popup-blocked starts needed explicit coverage.

candidates.title: Server-backed encrypted transfer
candidates.evidence: User explicitly excluded CF Pages/D1/Better Auth.
candidates.reason: This requires Cloudflare Pages Functions, D1/KV, or other server infrastructure, which the user excluded from this goal.

tasks.title: Confirm contained implementation boundary
tasks.expected_output: Bounded implementation map with any missing storage keys, route risks, test commands, and scope expansion warnings.

receipt.summary: Scout found no persistence outside scope and one missed builder UI preference key.
evidence: src/App.tsx catch-all means hidden migration routes must be added before '*'
App route tests use MemoryRouter plain paths

tasks.title: Implement domain storage migration modules
tasks.expected_output: Typed storage snapshot, import planning/apply, bridge protocol helpers, and focused tests.

receipt.summary: Implemented typed storage snapshot collector, import plan/apply policy, and bridge protocol helpers.
risks: Browser opener/origin behavior still needs route tests and two-origin verification.

tasks.title: Implement hidden migration routes
tasks.expected_output: Hidden /migrate and /migrate/export routes wired to the migration domain helpers with focused route tests.

receipt.summary: Implemented hidden migration receive/export routes and wired them into App before the catch-all route.
validation: npm run build passed with existing Vite chunk-size warnings
two-origin Playwright verification passed from 5173 to 5174
risks: Mobile popup behavior should still be smoke-tested manually before launch communications.

tasks.title: Audit migration diff and receipts
tasks.expected_output: Review findings, final audit, and any required fixes before completion.

receipt.summary: Reviewed migration domain modules, hidden routes, tests, and docs; tightened snapshot import validation during review.
evidence: src/domain/storage-migration/storageMigrationSnapshot.ts validates known keys, matching categories, and per-key values on import
src/features/migration/MigrationReceivePage.tsx keeps conflict replacement opt-in and writes backups before replacement
src/App.tsx wires hidden migration routes before the catch-all
validation: npm run build passed with existing Vite chunk-size and plugin timing warnings
two-origin Playwright verification passed between 127.0.0.1:5173 and 127.0.0.1:5174
risks: Mobile popup/manual paste behavior should still be smoke-tested on real devices before launch communications.

tasks.title: Implement quiet migration discovery notice
tasks.expected_output: Dismissible app-level domain move notice and friendlier migration copy.

receipt.summary: Added app-level domain move notice, old/new origin data heuristics, dismissal storage, migration-route suppression, and friendlier transfer-code wording.
validation: npx vitest run src/App.test.tsx src/features/migration/DomainMigrationNotice.test.tsx src/features/migration/MigrationReceivePage.test.tsx src/features/migration/MigrationExportPage.test.tsx src/domain/storage-migration/storageMigrationSnapshot.test.ts src/domain/storage-migration/migrationImportPolicy.test.ts src/domain/storage-migration/migrationBridgeProtocol.test.ts passed, 39 tests
npm run build passed with existing Vite chunk-size and plugin timing warnings
two-origin Playwright notice smoke check passed on 390px viewport using 127.0.0.1:5173 as old origin and 127.0.0.1:5174 as new origin

performance follow-up removed the full bridge/snapshot validator chain from DomainMigrationNotice; dev home dropped from about 9.4 MB/116 resources to about 4.4 MB/44 resources and preview home from about 338 KB/39 resources to about 210 KB/22 resources
risks: Real mobile browsers should still be smoke-tested before launch communications.

tasks.title: Production readiness audit and hardening
tasks.expected_output: Production-readiness review, focused edge-case hardening, and validation receipts.

receipt.summary: Hardened the migration export/receive workflow for reused named export windows, wrong-origin export route access, empty source snapshots, and popup-blocked starts.
evidence: src/features/migration/MigrationExportPage.tsx sends once per nonce/target request and rejects non-source origins
src/features/migration/MigrationReceivePage.tsx provides a manual transfer-page fallback link when window.open is blocked
src/features/migration/MigrationExportPage.test.tsx and MigrationReceivePage.test.tsx cover the new edge cases
validation: npx vitest run src/App.test.tsx src/features/migration/DomainMigrationNotice.test.tsx src/features/migration/MigrationReceivePage.test.tsx src/features/migration/MigrationExportPage.test.tsx src/domain/storage-migration/storageMigrationSnapshot.test.ts src/domain/storage-migration/migrationImportPolicy.test.ts src/domain/storage-migration/migrationBridgeProtocol.test.ts passed, 44 tests
npm run test:bounded passed, 195 files and 1277 tests
two-origin Playwright smoke passed on 390px viewport using 127.0.0.1:5173 as old origin and 127.0.0.1:5174 as new origin, including first import plus reused-popup conflict flow
risks: Real production origins still need a final launch smoke after DNS/build routing is pointed at the target host.

final_audit.summary: Contained client-side domain storage transfer bridge, quiet discovery notice, performance cleanup, and production-readiness hardening implemented and reviewed; CF Pages, D1, Better Auth, DNS, deploy config, dependencies, and unrelated UI refactor work remained out of scope.
validation: npx vitest run src/App.test.tsx src/features/migration/DomainMigrationNotice.test.tsx src/features/migration/MigrationReceivePage.test.tsx src/features/migration/MigrationExportPage.test.tsx src/domain/storage-migration/storageMigrationSnapshot.test.ts src/domain/storage-migration/migrationImportPolicy.test.ts src/domain/storage-migration/migrationBridgeProtocol.test.ts passed, 44 tests
npm run test:bounded passed, 195 files and 1277 tests
two-origin Playwright notice smoke check passed on 390px viewport using 127.0.0.1:5173 as old origin and 127.0.0.1:5174 as new origin
two-origin Playwright verification passed between 127.0.0.1:5173 and 127.0.0.1:5174 after final validation hardening
two-origin Playwright production-readiness smoke passed with first import plus reused-popup conflict flow
performance follow-up kept the notice lightweight; dev home measured about 4.4 MB/44 resources and preview home about 210 KB/22 resources after the fix
open_items: Smoke-test real mobile browsers before launch communications.
Smoke-test the live https://skeydb.com/#/migrate to https://dansa.github.io/SKeyDB/#/migrate/export flow after DNS/build routing is final.
